source_pr.title: util: resolve data race
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? 
#14419

### What is changed and how it works?
change to using `atomic.LoadInt64()` to obtain the `CommitBackoffTime`.

### Check List 

Tests

symptoms: PR title/merge commit says "resolve data race".
failure_signature: PR title/merge commit says "resolve data race".
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: util: resolve data race.

evidence: evidence: PR title/merge commit says "resolve data race".
evidence: diff uses atomic.LoadInt64(&commitDetails.CommitBackoffTime) to avoid concurrent read/write (util/stmtsummary/statement_summary.go).
